emails.body:
Team,

Annual fitness report season is upon us. I need your input blocks for LCDR Martinez's report by COB Friday, 4 October. Standard format: primary duties, significant achievements, leadership assessments, and recommended competitive categories.

James — since you've worked with Jeff on the ATaS validation effort, please include a paragraph on his technical contributions there. Keep it unclassified and suitable for the official record.

Let me know if you need the template re-sent.

V/R,
Laura

CAPT Kim,

Received. I'll have my self-assessment and brag sheet to you by Wednesday. Appreciate the heads-up on the timeline.

V/R,
Stix

CAPT Kim,

Attached is my draft input for LCDR Martinez's FITREP. I focused on his lead role in the ATaS validation framework — specifically the statistical test design and the cross-team coordination with the JIATF analysis cell. His work kept the validation timeline on track despite the data ingest delays in August.

Happy to adjust phrasing if you need a different emphasis.

V/R,
James

Stix, James —

Thanks to both of you. I've incorporated the inputs and routed the final package to the admin shop for formatting. James, your paragraph on the validation framework reads well; I only tightened the wording on the "cross-team coordination" line to fit the character limit.

Stix — your self-assessment arrived on time and was thorough. No further action needed from either of you unless the detailer comes back with questions.

V/R,
Laura
